description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat and slightly sloped roof, featuring a combination of wood and white plaster exterior finishes. The house is surrounded by a wooden fence and includes a small, landscaped yard with several large trees and shrubs. The front facade has large glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and access to outdoor seating areas. A balcony with metal railings and potted plants is visible on the upper floor, while a carport with a transparent roof is attached to one side. The rear of the house features a private garden area and additional outdoor seating. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, multi-story house with wood and white plaster exterior, large windows, balconies, and a landscaped yard enclosed by a wooden fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass windows, sliding doors, two prominent trees, and a balcony with metal railings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport with a transparent roof, vertical window arrangement, and rooftop greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a private garden area, additional outdoor seating, and a clear view of the wooden fence and carport.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing asymmetrical window placement, rooftop garden, and the integration of trees and shrubs along the fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large glass panels and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a large glass door, minimal steps, and a small porch area integrated with the front yard landscaping.
